title: Champions all round
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The competition was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The competition was intense on Friday 13 September for soccer teams of the Sticks & Balls Sports Academy, playing the finals of their league season.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The competition was intense on Friday 13 September for soccer teams of the Sticks & Balls Sports Academy, playing the finals of their league season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was Friday the 13th for the losers, but for some of the teams, especially the U-10 King of Cars, who rose to the spirit of the competition, it was an unbelievable result that only intense competition can produce.","html":"It was Friday the 13th for the losers, but for some of the teams, especially the U-10 King of Cars, who rose to the spirit of the competition, it was an unbelievable result that only intense competition can produce."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The team of youngsters ended their previous run against Green Mouse, starting with a loss of 12-0, then a 5-3 loss, followed by another loss of 4-3 then… a 3-2 win in the final!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A team spirit that left some joy - and some tears.","html":"A team spirit that left some joy - and some tears."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The soccer is run on a round-robin league format for eight teams,\" said the academy's Byron Shrosbree.","html":"\"The soccer is run on a round-robin league format for eight teams,\" said the academy's Byron Shrosbree."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The academy has been in existence for five years in a variety of social sports programmes, from 5-a-side soccer, netball, hockey, indoor cricket, touch rugby for kids and adults of all ages and skill levels.","html":"The academy has been in existence for five years in a variety of social sports programmes, from 5-a-side soccer, netball, hockey, indoor cricket, touch rugby for kids and adults of all ages and skill levels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Four leagues per year","html":"Four leagues per year"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There are more than 800 weekly participants in Plett and the junior soccer league was the feature this past weekend.U-15 league winners Rolfe Warriors.","html":"There are more than 800 weekly participants in Plett and the junior soccer league was the feature this past weekend.U-15 league winners Rolfe Warriors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We have 150 kids, from all over Plett, participating all year round, playing four leagues per year, each league lasting eight weeks during each term,\" says Shrosbree.","html":"\"We have 150 kids, from all over Plett, participating all year round, playing four leagues per year, each league lasting eight weeks during each term,\" says Shrosbree."},{"type":"list","items":["The Under 10 Winners: King of Cars","Under 13 Winners: Future Stars (a team that is part of a Non-Profit Organisation in Kranshoek)","Under 15 Winners: Rolfe Warriors"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shrosbree thanked all the junior soccer sponsors: GMA Group; Maverick Events & Tents; Illios Travel; Simon Rolfe Maintenance Management; King of Cars; and PIPS.","html":"Shrosbree thanked all the junior soccer sponsors: GMA Group; Maverick Events & Tents; Illios Travel; Simon Rolfe Maintenance Management; King of Cars; and PIPS."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information: [email protected] / 071 252 4259.","html":"For more information: [email protected] / 071 252 4259."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
